items.headline: Philipsen wins a wild 40-man breakaway sprint at the Tour — Pogačar still in yellow
items.body: Stage 17 into Voiron turned into one of the fastest, most chaotic days of the whole Tour — roughly half of it ridden flat-out — before Belgian speedster Jasper Philipsen out-kicked a 40-rider breakaway for his 11th career Tour stage win, tightening up the green points-jersey race. Nothing changed up top: Tadej Pogačar keeps the yellow jersey with just a few days left to Paris.
items.say: The Tour de France is into its last few days — Philipsen won this crazy 40-man sprint today, and Pogačar's basically got the whole thing locked up in yellow. Easy one to have on in the background this week.

items.headline: A Hall of Fame first — Steph Curry gets his own exhibit while he's still playing
items.body: The Basketball Hall of Fame is doing something it's never done in nearly 75 years: a dedicated exhibit for an active player. 'Stephen Curry: Beyond the Arc' opens Friday in Springfield, tracing the two-time MVP and all-time three-point king from overlooked college kid to global superstar, with game-worn gear, championship hardware and Olympic keepsakes.
items.say: Did you hear the Basketball Hall of Fame is giving Steph Curry his own exhibit while he's still playing? First time ever for an active player. Kind of says it all about what he did to the game. You a Curry guy?

links.text: NBA.com · Hall of Fame breaks tradition for Curry exhibit
ESPN · Curry first active player with own HOF exhibit

items.headline: WNBA All-Star weekend is here — Caitlin Clark vs. Paige Bueckers in Chicago
items.body: The league's big midsummer party lands this weekend: All-Star Friday (Skills Challenge and 3-Point Contest) on July 24, then the All-Star Game itself Saturday at Chicago's United Center on ABC. The captains drafted a fun split — Caitlin Clark and A'ja Wilson on one side, Paige Bueckers and Breanna Stewart on the other — so it's the young superstars going head-to-head.
items.say: WNBA All-Star weekend's in Chicago this weekend — Caitlin Clark and A'ja Wilson on one team, Paige Bueckers and Stewart on the other. Should be a fun one to put on Saturday. You catch any WNBA this year?

links.text: Yahoo Sports · All-Star Game schedule, rosters & how to watch

items.headline: Counter-Strike's spicy summer rolls on — Falcons meet the new 100 Thieves today
items.body: The BLAST Bounty Summer qualifier is heating up, and Wednesday brings a marquee matchup: Falcons — the Cologne Major champs — against the freshly-rebuilt 100 Thieves roster, part of a 32-team scrap for spots at the LAN finals in Malta. Vitality, MOUZ, G2 and FaZe are all in the field too. Easy, low-stakes-but-fun CS to have on this week.
items.say: Counter-Strike's on again this week — the Cologne Major champs Falcons are playing the new-look 100 Thieves squad today. Good stuff to have on in the background. You keeping up with CS at all?

links.text: Esports.gg · BLAST Bounty Summer qualifier details & results

items.headline: The internet stopped for a trailer — 'Avengers: Doomsday' hits 503 million views in a day
items.body: Marvel dropped the first full 'Avengers: Doomsday' trailer Monday and it went nuclear: 503 million views in 24 hours, shattering Disney's all-time record and landing as the second-biggest trailer launch ever, behind only 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day.' Robert Downey Jr.'s Doctor Doom anchors a heroes-and-villains mashup — Avengers, Fantastic Four and X-Men all colliding — ahead of the film's December 18 release.
items.say: Did you see the Avengers: Doomsday trailer? Half a billion views in one day — broke Disney's record. Downey's playing the villain now, Doctor Doom. The whole internet lost it. You watch it yet?

links.text: Variety · Doomsday trailer hits 503M views, breaks Disney record

items.headline: Nerd Christmas is here — San Diego Comic-Con kicks off tonight
items.body: Preview Night opens the show floor Wednesday, with the full four-day pop-culture blowout running through Sunday. It's a big year: Marvel Studios returns to the legendary Hall H (expect the 'Doomsday' cast on stage Saturday), Apple TV+ takes over Hall H for the first time ever, and 'Rings of Power' and a live-action 'Avatar: Aang' movie are all in the mix. Basically a week of jaw-dropping trailer drops.
items.say: Comic-Con kicks off tonight in San Diego — Marvel's back in Hall H, Apple's doing its first-ever panel, all the big trailer reveals. Even if you're not a comics person it's fun to see what leaks out. Any of that stuff your thing?

links.text: TechTimes · Comic-Con 2026 opens tonight — Hall H guide
TV Insider · Full list of SDCC 2026 TV & movie panels

items.headline: 'Star Trek: Strange New Worlds' beams back Thursday for Season 4
items.body: The most crowd-pleasing modern Trek returns July 23 on Paramount+, kicking off a 10-episode Season 4 that rolls out weekly through late September. Word is this run leans harder into a young James T. Kirk and his growing bond with Spock. Optimistic, mostly one-and-done episodes — a great jump-on point if you've been meaning to give Star Trek a shot.
items.say: New season of Star Trek: Strange New Worlds drops Thursday — it's the fun, easygoing Trek, each episode kind of its own little story. Good one to start with if you've never gotten into Star Trek. You watch any?

links.text: Star Trek: Strange New Worlds — Season 4 Trailer (Paramount+)

items.headline: Tom Hiddleston plays time-detective in Nat Geo's 'Pompeii: Out of Time' — premieres tonight
items.body: Loki himself hosts this three-part docudrama premiering July 22 on National Geographic (streaming next day on Disney+ and Hulu). It blends cinematic scripted drama with real forensic detective work to rebuild the final hours before Vesuvius buried Pompeii — and makes the case that many of the victims actually had a chance to escape. Gorgeous to look at and genuinely fascinating.
items.say: There's a new Tom Hiddleston thing on Nat Geo tonight — 'Pompeii: Out of Time,' where he basically plays detective piecing together the last hours before the volcano hit. Looks beautiful. You into history stuff like that?

links.text: Pompeii: Out of Time with Tom Hiddleston — Official Trailer (National Geographic)
Deadline · Nat Geo unveils the 'Pompeii: Out of Time' docudrama

items.headline: Future passes Eminem — 'The Real Me' debuts at No. 1 for his 12th chart-topper
items.body: Future's new album 'The Real Me' bows atop the Billboard 200 with roughly 131K first-week units, giving him his 12th career No. 1 — moving him past Eminem and into rare air behind only the Beatles, Drake, Taylor Swift and Jay-Z. It's his first solo album in a few years, a sprawling 22 tracks led by the single 'Radio.' Peak windows-down summer rap.
items.say: Future just landed his 12th No. 1 album — passed Eminem for it. Wild longevity for a rapper. Good windows-down summer driving music. You mess with Future?

links.text: Billboard · Future scores 12th No. 1 album with 'The Real Me'
